controls.title: Account Management
controls.description: Manage information system accounts, group memberships, privileges, workflow, notifications, deactivations, and authorizations

implementation.description: Configure IAM policies with least privilege access for DataSync operations, implement role-based access with specific permissions for source and destination resources

controls.title: Access Enforcement
controls.description: Enforce approved authorizations for logical access to information and system resources

implementation.description: Implement resource-based policies and IAM conditions in CloudFormation/Terraform templates to restrict DataSync access based on source IP, time, and MFA requirements

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information

implementation.description: Enable TLS encryption for data in transit, configure DataSync to use VPC endpoints for private network communication

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.description: Protect the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest

implementation.description: Configure encryption at rest for destination storage services (S3, EFS, FSx) using AWS KMS customer-managed keys

controls.title: Event Logging
controls.description: Identify the types of events that the system is capable of logging

implementation.description: Enable CloudTrail logging for all DataSync API calls and configure CloudWatch logging for task execution details

controls.title: Audit Review, Analysis, and Reporting
controls.description: Review and analyze information system audit records for indications of inappropriate activity

implementation.description: Deploy CloudWatch dashboards and alarms to monitor DataSync task failures, performance metrics, and unusual activity patterns

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.description: Develop, document, and maintain a current baseline configuration

implementation.description: Use Infrastructure as Code templates to maintain consistent DataSync agent and task configurations across environments

controls.title: Vulnerability Monitoring and Scanning
controls.description: Monitor and scan for vulnerabilities in the information system and hosted applications

implementation.description: Regularly update DataSync agents and monitor AWS security bulletins for service vulnerabilities

controls.title: Identity and Access Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: Policies and procedures shall be established for identity and access management

implementation.description: Establish organizational policies for DataSync access management, including approval workflows for cross-account transfers and data classification handling

controls.title: User Access Provisioning
controls.description: User access provisioning procedures shall be established

implementation.description: Implement automated user provisioning for DataSync using AWS SSO or identity federation with temporary credentials and session limits

controls.title: Data Security and Information Lifecycle Management
controls.description: Procedures shall be established for data security throughout the information lifecycle

implementation.description: Classify data before transfer, implement appropriate encryption and access controls, and establish data retention policies for transferred data

controls.title: Secure Disposal
controls.description: Procedures shall be established for the secure disposal of data

implementation.description: Configure DataSync to securely delete temporary files and implement secure deletion procedures for DataSync agents when decommissioned

controls.title: Information Security Management Program
controls.description: An information security management program shall be established

implementation.description: Include DataSync usage in organizational security management program with regular security assessments and compliance reviews

controls.title: Vulnerability / Patch Management
controls.description: Policies and procedures shall be established for vulnerability and patch management

implementation.description: Maintain current DataSync agent versions and establish procedures for timely security updates and patches

controls.title: Logging and Monitoring Policy
controls.description: Policies and procedures shall be established for logging and monitoring

implementation.description: Establish logging policies for DataSync operations including data classification, retention periods, and access to log data

controls.title: IAM policies should not allow full administrative privileges
controls.description: IAM policies should not have statements with Effect: Allow with Action: * over Resource: *

implementation.description: Create specific IAM policies for DataSync with granular permissions limited to required actions on specific resources

controls.title: IAM users' access keys should be rotated every 90 days or less
controls.description: Access keys should be rotated to ensure that data cannot be accessed with an old key that might have been lost, cracked, or stolen

implementation.description: Use IAM roles instead of access keys for DataSync agents, implement automated key rotation if programmatic access is required

controls.title: CloudTrail should be enabled and configured with at least one multi-Region trail
controls.description: CloudTrail creates a trail that enables logging of AWS API calls and related events made by or on behalf of an AWS account

implementation.description: Enable CloudTrail in all regions to capture DataSync API calls, configure log file validation and encryption

controls.title: S3 buckets should have server-side encryption enabled
controls.description: S3 buckets should have server-side encryption enabled to protect data at rest

implementation.description: Enable default encryption on S3 buckets used as DataSync destinations, use customer-managed KMS keys for sensitive data

controls.title: S3 buckets should require requests to use SSL
controls.description: S3 buckets should have policies that require all requests to use SSL

implementation.description: Implement bucket policies that deny non-SSL requests for S3 buckets used with DataSync

controls.title: AWS Config should be enabled
controls.description: AWS Config should be enabled to monitor configuration changes

implementation.description: Enable AWS Config to track DataSync configuration changes and compliance with organizational policies

controls.title: DataSync locations should be encrypted in transit
controls.description: DataSync tasks should use encrypted protocols when transferring data to protect data in transit

implementation.description: Configure DataSync tasks to use encrypted transfer protocols (TLS for NFS/SMB, HTTPS for object storage)

controls.title: DataSync task logging should be enabled
controls.description: DataSync tasks should have logging enabled to CloudWatch for monitoring and troubleshooting

implementation.description: Enable CloudWatch logging for all DataSync tasks and configure appropriate log retention policies

controls.title: DataSync agents should be deployed in private subnets
controls.description: DataSync agents should be deployed in private subnets to reduce exposure to internet-based threats

implementation.description: Deploy DataSync agents in private subnets with VPC endpoints for AWS service communication

controls.title: DataSync should use IAM roles instead of IAM users
controls.description: DataSync should use IAM roles for secure access to AWS resources

implementation.description: Configure DataSync tasks to use IAM service roles instead of IAM user credentials

controls.title: Optimize Data Transfer Scheduling
controls.description: Schedule data transfers during off-peak hours to reduce network costs and improve performance

implementation.description: Configure DataSync tasks to run during off-peak hours using CloudWatch Events, implement task scheduling to avoid peak network usage periods

controls.title: Use Bandwidth Throttling
controls.description: Implement bandwidth throttling to control network utilization and associated costs

implementation.description: Configure bandwidth throttling on DataSync tasks to limit network usage during business hours and prevent network congestion charges

controls.title: Implement Incremental Transfers
controls.description: Use incremental data transfer capabilities to minimize data transfer volumes and costs

implementation.description: Configure DataSync to transfer only changed files by enabling file modification time and size verification options

controls.title: Right-size DataSync Agents
controls.description: Select appropriate instance types for DataSync agents based on transfer requirements

implementation.description: Use cost-effective EC2 instance types for DataSync agents, implement auto-scaling for variable workloads, consider Spot instances for non-critical transfers

controls.title: Optimize Storage Classes
controls.description: Transfer data directly to appropriate S3 storage classes to minimize storage costs

implementation.description: Configure DataSync tasks to transfer infrequently accessed data directly to S3 IA or Glacier storage classes

controls.title: Monitor and Alert on Costs
controls.description: Implement cost monitoring and alerting for DataSync operations

implementation.description: Set up Cost and Usage Reports, create CloudWatch billing alarms, and implement AWS Budgets for DataSync-related costs

controls.title: Use VPC Endpoints
controls.description: Implement VPC endpoints to reduce data transfer costs for AWS service communication

implementation.description: Deploy VPC endpoints for S3, EFS, and other AWS services to avoid internet data transfer charges when using DataSync within AWS

controls.title: Implement Data Lifecycle Policies
controls.description: Configure automatic data lifecycle management to optimize long-term storage costs

implementation.description: Set up S3 lifecycle policies to automatically transition transferred data to lower-cost storage tiers based on access patterns
